name: Andrew Yang
subject: Only if we can keep it on air
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
. . .

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=2939%2E377263%2ErIiwlQ) Yang Gang --

It’s been tremendous meeting thousands of Americans around the country. And with our newly launched TV ad, hundreds of thousands of Americans will learn about our Humanity First campaign.

But we need to keep it on the air to keep spreading the message and drive the polls in Iowa. We need more people in the early primary states to hear the message, and we still need to qualify for the December debate.

My team tells me that we haven’t yet hit our goal of a million dollars to fund another ad buy. In fact, we’re really behind where we need to be.

I’m hoping that you can help us get there. I’ve done the math, and these ads are the most efficient way to reach voters who haven’t heard my new way forward. By reaching these voters, our poll numbers will increase, getting me on that debate stage and getting our vision for the future of the country in front of even more Americans. And the more Americans hear this vision, the closer we get to the White House.

But it all starts with you. **[Can you donate today to help keep the ad on the air?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16499?t=5&akid=2939%2E377263%2ErIiwlQ)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16499?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=2939%2E377263%2ErIiwlQ)

-Andrew

First, Congresswoman Katie Porter -- a former law student of Elizabeth's who worked with her to study why middle-class families are struggling, and who flipped a House seat last November -- announced she was endorsing Elizabeth's campaign for president.

Then, Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley, the first woman of color to represent Massachusetts in Congress, said "big, structural change can't wait" -- and also announced she was all in for Team Warren.

And just yesterday, to celebrate the one-year anniversary of electing a record-breaking number of women to office, Team Warren announced endorsements from incredible elected women in state and local legislatures all across the country.

This has been a big week for our campaign -- and for all the Women with Warren across the country.

**That's why we're commemorating this special moment by giving away 200 copies of our limited-edition "Women with Warren" art prints -- signed by Elizabeth -- to supporters who chip in during this special week.**

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: Healing our country's soul
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
**"I am running because I honestly believe that our only choice – our Hobson’s choice – is not just to beat Mr. Trump, but to heal our country's soul by uniting America again."**
That was what I told C-SPAN's Steve Scully in my [interview](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11720429/119677909/1914699893?465579-1/interview-joe-sestak&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjBlODhjNC1jYTAzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0mjlutcCoJNWkOnNxFPBWfr0qrHjRSjvBIdRndT9Wnw=&emci=4511dd29-3703-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=520e88c4-ca03-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798) yesterday, speaking on accountable leadership in Washington, the challenge of the impeachment trial... and the loss of trust in America because of unaccountable leadership from those in Washington DC, from the decision to invade Iraq, the devastation from the financial crisis and even the failure by then-chairman Biden to protect Anita Hill.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11720430/119677910/1914699893?465579-1/interview-joe-sestak&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjBlODhjNC1jYTAzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0mjlutcCoJNWkOnNxFPBWfr0qrHjRSjvBIdRndT9Wnw=&emci=4511dd29-3703-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=520e88c4-ca03-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)
**_I spoke on why I was running:_ **"I am running because I honestly believe that our only choice – our Hobson’s choice – is not just to beat Mr. Trump, but to heal our country's soul by uniting America again, where they believe somebody will be accountable to them — people -- above party, above self, above any special interest. That’s the primary reason I’m running. And the second reason is that we have for far too long had people in power who didn't understand that the military can stop a problem, but they will never fix a problem. Those democrats and republicans alike who voted for that tragic misadventure in Iraq, who did not know how it would end before they began, led all the way to Turkey’s shameless invasion against our Kurdish allies today. I am therefore also running to make sure we restore U.S. leadership to this global world order as presidents from John F. Kennedy to Ronald Reagan understood, that it was our leadership of this global accord around the world that kept our American dream alive and prospering."
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11720431/119677911/1036341175?refcode=em111019cspan&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjBlODhjNC1jYTAzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0mjlutcCoJNWkOnNxFPBWfr0qrHjRSjvBIdRndT9Wnw=)
**_On impeachment and Nixon:_** "This nation was quite divided then. It wasn’t quite the tear in the fabric of America we have today. Back then there was an impeachment process, but the difference was that that impeachment was about Mr. Nixon and whether he had broken a law or not. Today, this impeachment process is different. The nation is divided much more so, and it is divided because of language that is used and a sense of division that too often comes out from our commander in chief and President. Second, this impeachment is different because the president has wrapped himself in half of the country – not the whole of it, as the president is supposed to do when he represents the United States of America. So while I support this impeachment inquiry – because the President had asked a foreign leader to step in and interfere with the most blessed sanctity we have in America, our fair and free elections — I would hope it is done in the most nonpartisan way possible because that tear in our fabric of America will be bigger, no matter the outcome because of this divide in America. This country needs a President who speaks in words of unity, not division. And I think that is what makes this so different. There was a war once that tore us apart in Vietnam. As we would stand there in attention marching as we did every week at the Naval Academy, people would come around and put flowers in your rifles. But it was a different type of tear. It was over a policy. This has become one over who we are and what we can be. Frankly, that is why I am running. I think policies are so important, but I know that unless you can unite Americans again, we will not fix that tear in the cloth of America and therefore can never meet the defining challenges of our moment in history."
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11720432/119677913/1036341175?refcode=em111019cspan&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjBlODhjNC1jYTAzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0mjlutcCoJNWkOnNxFPBWfr0qrHjRSjvBIdRndT9Wnw=)
**_On unity:_** "I think Mr. Trump has forgotten what a leader is supposed to be, whether it is the captain of a ship or the commander in chief of our military forces, or President of the greatest nation in the world. Leaders bring together people. They are ones that unite a crew, because it is also a leader who does not believe he is above accountability. Which is why if the crew of a ship is suddenly harmed or a ship goes aground, the captain of a navy ship is relieved for cause. Because if he or she is not and the captain is seen as being above accountability for what occurred, the crew loses trust in the Captain and the ship disintegrates into chaos. That is what is happening to the United States ship of state. This president unfortunately believes he is above accountability, for bad decisions, for incendiary language that divides and does not unite. This is a simple leadership issue. We must respect the other side. By that I mean republicans and democrats. I represented a republican district. You cannot find a word from me putting down the Republican Party, but you can find me disagreeing on policies. I think we are in a question about can we heal our soul? Can we remind Americans who we are and what we can be when we are united together as one? And that is the challenge, because of the divisiveness that has come about from the rhetoric – unfortunately too often from the White House. It doesn't mean the Democrats haven't done it, but the president is the president — of the United States of America, not the divided states of America."
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11720434/119677914/1036341175?refcode=em111019cspan&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjBlODhjNC1jYTAzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0mjlutcCoJNWkOnNxFPBWfr0qrHjRSjvBIdRndT9Wnw=)
**_On Joe Biden and Anita Hill:_** "I do believe, just like a captain of a ship, if you are in charge, as he was as chair of the committee, that you should be accountable for how it was conducted. And it was not conducted at all in a fair means to Anita Hill. And that is my point, about those, as Mr. Biden also did, who voted for the war in Iraq or tore down the one place where we definitely do need a wall, to keep greed out and accountability in. When they tore the wall down, Wall Street destroyed my constituency's livelihoods in the great recession. But not one politician, not one – for the hearing of Anita Hill; for that war in Iraq, which left two decades of unaccountable consequences; or for the devastation the great recession did to our nation – has ever accounted for themselves. I believe very much that this unaccountable leadership is responsible for the lack of trust in America today, of whom we are and what we can be when we are united together, because we have lost faith in our leadership down there in Washington DC. So I do think that hearing was not handled well by someone who had been in office for four terms, and I think as you watch the hearings, you can see that Ms. Hill did not get humiliated because of her own personal strength, not because of how someone permitted that forum to be conducted."

**If you believe I have the unique message and experience we need to beat Mr. Trump, unite this nation and convene the world to face the defining challenges of our time, please contribute.**
Warmest regards,
Joe

name: Matt O'Malley
subject: I'm endorsing Joe Kennedy in the 2020 Senate primary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390952/55b66746/2ce819d2/80f26e4/1625197282/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | **As a proud Massachusetts progressive and a passionate environmentalist, I'm enthusiastically endorsing Joe Kennedy III in the 2020 Senate primary.** Joe shares the commitment to social and economic justice that defines my generation. He will fight for the systemic changes necessary to save our planet and our future. Here in Boston, I chair the City Council's Environment, Sustainability, and Parks Committee, and see combating climate change as not only a legislative priority, but a moral obligation we all share. We need fresh, powerful voices at every level of government that will give this issue the urgency it demands. **Joe is that kind of voice. He is****an original co-sponsor of both the Green New Deal and the 100% Clean Economy Act, which set aggressive agendas to reach net-zero emissions.** He stood up proudly with his colleagues in Congress to declare a climate emergency. On both the House Science and House Energy & Commerce Committees, Joe has a consistent record of fighting for climate action and holding fossil fuel companies accountable, working to keep the Clean Power Plan intact, prohibit oil and gas drilling off of New England's coast, maintain strong fuel efficiency standards, and eliminate exemptions from the Clean Air Act. **In the Commonwealth, Joe has championed offshore wind, not only to reach our renewable energy goals, but also to mobilize our local and regional economies to deliver good jobs to Massachusetts.** He has spearheaded efforts to create a 'Blue Economy' hub in his district, which would allow our Commonwealth to lead in renewable energy while protecting vulnerable coastal communities, preserving ocean ecosystems, and tackling marine pollution. **Joe is also a consistent champion for climate and environmental justice --urging us all to focus on the frontline communities most impacted by climate change and least equipped to shoulder that burden. ** Don't just take it from me. Joe has a 95 percent lifetime score from the League of Conservation Voters, a 100 percent voting record with Clean Water Action, and has been endorsed by the Sierra Club in all of his past elections. **Lastly, and perhaps most importantly,_Joe shows up_.** On this issue. On every issue. He is present, he is engaged and he is attentive. Around Massachusetts, he is known for being everywhere. He calls. He emails. He checks in. He responds [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390952/55b66746/2ce819d2/80f26e5/1625197282/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-11-10-omalley&recurring=1&amount=3") **The Joe I know is willing to get in the trenches of progressive change, on the ground in our communities, shoulder to shoulder with our people, every single day.** That's the kind of U.S. senator Massachusetts deserves. **[Please join me in supporting Joe's campaign. Contribute $3 now!](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390952/55b66746/2ce819d2/80f26e5/1625197282/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-11-10-omalley&recurring=1&amount=3")** _Matt_ Matt O'Malley Boston City Councilor, District 6 Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390952/55b66746/2ce819d2/80f26e6/1625197282/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-11-10-omalley&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390952/55b66746/2ce819d2/80f26e7/1625197282/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-11-10-omalley&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390952/55b66746/2ce819d2/80f26e0/1625197282/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-11-10-omalley&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390952/55b66746/2ce819d2/80f26e1/1625197282/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-11-10-omalley&refcode2=express-buttons")

body:
I'm fighting to put power into the hands of working people, but I can't do it alone -- it's only possible with contributions from grassroots donors. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528f5f/45c30650/104eeb21d/66f5b933/3405124715/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
I'm going to ask if you can make your first donation to our campaign to help catch up to our $1 million fundraising goal, but first, I want to talk about why hitting this goal is powerfully important.

When I made the decision to run this campaign the right way -- without sucking up to corporate executives on Wall Street and special interests in Washington -- some cynics said that we would struggle to raise the money we need.

But I don't want their support, and we don't need it. I have something better -- I have you by my side. And when this team chips in to hit each and every fundraising goal, we send a message that it _is_ possible to run campaigns without catering to the wealthy and well-connected.

**[I'm fighting to put power into the hands of working people, but I can't do it alone-- it's only possible with contributions from grassroots donors. Will you make your first donation right now to help make sure we hit this goal?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528f5f/45c30650/104eeb21d/66f5a53b/3405124715/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDIwRl9FR0xfTkZGX0VfMjAxOTExMTBfVjFTMl9QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML20F_EGL_NFF_E_20191110_V1S2_P_T1")**

>
This campaign is based on the core principle that everyone gets equal access.

So during big fundraising pushes like this week, you won't see me hosting swanky fundraisers where you can only get in if you write a ginormous check. Instead, we send emails like this one to help hit our fundraising goals.

name: Bryce Smith, Team Cory
subject: Astronaut dream.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| _Hear from Bryce, a small business owner in Adel, Iowa, about Cory 's plan to bring economic opportunity to every community, then **[add your name to stand with Cory in leaving no one and no place behind.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/econ-policy-3?source=em_pet_20191110_BS_20191110-pet-BS-Bryce-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_ Hey there, my name is Bryce, and I'm a proud small business owner in Adel, Iowa. Here's the story of how I came to own the Adel Family Fun Center, and how policies like the one Cory put out a few days ago, would help young entrepreneurs like myself. I grew up bowling. In middle school, my friends and I would head over to the Adel Family Fun Center every Saturday for youth league. And once I was old enough to hold a job, I worked for Sandi, the owner at the time, doing anything and everything I could to learn more about the business. A few years later, when I was getting close to the end of college, I was back home at the same bowling alley when Sandi approached me and said, _" I don't know what your plans are, but I'm wanting to retire, and I always think of you when I think about who can run this place."_ At that point, I didn't know what my plans were either, but I was at a crossroads. I had gotten my degree in education and had student loan debt I had to pay off, but owning the bowling alley I grew up in was an "astronaut dream" \-- that thing you always dream of but realistically, don't believe will ever happen -- of mine. **I had a choice: move away from the community that raised me to work for a big business or the highest paying school districts, or take a risk to become an entrepreneur in my hometown.** I ultimately decided to come back to Adel, a place where I saw potential in economic prosperity. But applying for a bank loan at 23 years old, with student debt and no credit history, I was constantly turned down and turned away. **[But as our next president, Cory Booker plans to give small businesses the resources they need to grow and compete without being trampled by giant corporations. It's something that could've helped me when starting out and that's why I've added my name to support his plan. Will you join me?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/econ-policy-3?source=em_pet_20191110_BS_20191110-pet-BS-Bryce-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I was nearing the end of my known financial resources when a local bank right here in Adel took the risk and approved me for the loan I needed to purchase the bowling alley. It's how I was able to keep this 60-year-old business open to the community. [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/econ-policy-3?source=em_pet_20191110_BS_20191110-pet-BS-Bryce-actives_actives_i1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
_Me at the Adel Family Fun Center, the local bowling alley I became the owner of in 2015._ As the owner of a small business in a 5,000-person town in Iowa, I've seen firsthand the challenges that young entrepreneurs face. I've seen the rural areas near Adel lose their community-centric philosophy as they've turned more suburban in the last 25 years or seen their population move to bigger cities. How national chains come into our surrounding communities and make it harder for local businesses that have been there for over 100 years to compete. I've seen my neighbors choose to work in big cities rather than return home after college as their parents had because of the job security they'll have. Cory believes that **" No one should have to leave their home to find economic opportunity in America."** I am fortunate to say that the community I grew up in is the same community I currently live in, but that is not an option for far too many young people across the country. **I support Cory 's plan because he's ready to fight for small businesses like mine and make it possible for all Americans, not just those in cities, to attain their astronaut dreams as I did. He knows that our economy does better when everyone has a stake in its success, and that means not leaving any community -- whether urban, rural, or somewhere in between -- behind.** **[Add your name if you agree that it's time for a president who supports small businesses in all corners of the country.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/econ-policy-3?source=em_pet_20191110_BS_20191110-pet-BS-Bryce-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks so much,
Bryce Bryce Smith
Small Business Owner
Adel, Iowa _P.S. Cory is the real deal. This is him with myself, my husband, and my grandmother when he came to Adel to get out the vote in October of 2018._ [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/econ-policy-3?source=em_pet_20191110_BS_20191110-pet-BS-Bryce-actives_actives_i2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a9d/5fca0d19/7983d8a2/291c6cca/2106360771/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a9d/5fca0d19/7983d8a2/291c6cc9/2106360771/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a9d/5fca0d19/7983d8a2/291c6cc8/2106360771/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a9d/5fca0d19/7983d8a2/291c6cd7/2106360771/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a9d/5fca0d19/7983d8a2/291c6ccb/2106360771/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: "Steven Law, president of Senate Leadership Fund, a super PAC aligned with Majority Leader Mitch McConnell, said at a donor event Thursday night..."
body:
We can't do that.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f03/4bef7a87/6bef9b27/287fccf3/3895065462/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends -- This is bad:
**" Steven Law, president of Senate Leadership Fund, a super PAC aligned with Majority Leader Mitch McConnell, said at a donor event Thursday night that the goal of SLF and its affiliated nonprofit One Nation was to raise $200 million for the cycle, and that they are on track to raise $50 million this year."
_\- Politico_ , 11/08**
Super PACs like Senate Leadership Fund can raise this kind of money because they can always just call up their wealthy, special interest donors for cash.
Our team can't do that -- and we wouldn't want to anyway. We're proud of the fact that we are funding this campaign through small-dollar, grassroots donations and NOT corporate PAC money.

| Team,

The GOP establishment has joined forces and created a brand new fundraising committee to funnel money into Cory Gardner's campaign.

They're calling it the _" Keep the Senate Red" _fund--and I won't mince words--it's a real threat. This committee is another mechanism for very wealthy special interests to pool their funds and try to buy this seat.

It allows millionaires and billionaires from all over the country to combine forces, support endangered Republicans with huge infusions of campaign cash, and help Mitch McConnell retain his majority in the Senate.

[**_We can 't let that happen. Chip in $26, and let's send the message that this seat belongs to the people of Colorado._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191110_MES_20191110-fr-MES-red-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Let's be clear: We're not waiting for a giant fund set up by powerful interests to swoop in and raise money for us. John won't accept a single penny from corporate PACs. He's made that clear since day one. This campaign is powered by donations from supporters like you.

Today is my 38th birthday and my first birthday as a candidate. I woke up to so many good wishes that made my heart soar.
Being a candidate is a unique honor: you always have an excuse to go places you've never been and meet people you've never met. This particular birthday reminds me of all of the neighbors and new friends we've met these past few months of campaigning and of the people we have yet to meet as the campaign season ramps up.

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Looking for your input
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Friends, there is a lot at stake in our next election.

**[Nothing is more important than defeating Donald Trump in 2020 while winning the Senate and holding the House.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae15/134673f2/a79f330/6997c55d/1075069234/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiJ9/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/2020_priority_survey?refcode=EM_SURV_B1_111019_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=")**

If we're going to create an America that works for all of us, one that the next generation deserves, we've got to work together.

That's why I'm running for president. It's clear that we need a leader who can win back Trump territories and also make progress for the next generation.

**[As my campaign progresses, it's crucial to stay in touch with voters across the country. That's why I'm looking for your input. Will you take a brief moment to fill out my survey and let me know what matters most to you right now?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae15/134673f2/a79f330/6997c55d/1075069234/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiJ9/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/2020_priority_survey?refcode=EM_SURV_B1_111019_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=")**
---
| | [BEGIN SURVEY >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae15/134673f2/a79f330/6997c55d/1075069234/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiJ9/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/2020_priority_survey?refcode=EM_SURV_B1_111019_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=")
---
Here's what matters to me:

Ensuring universal health coverage matters.

Ending childhood poverty matters.

Addressing the existential threat of climate change matters.

Providing free preschool and fixing our crumbling public education system matters.

Overturning Citizens United and passing government reform to root out corruption matters.

Making sure that the American economy works for everyone matters.

**[I have ambitious and durable solutions to reverse the damage done by Donald Trump and make progress on our greatest challenges, but everyone's voice should be heard.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae15/134673f2/a79f330/6997c55d/1075069234/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiJ9/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/2020_priority_survey?refcode=EM_SURV_B1_111019_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=")**

That's why I'm interested in hearing from you. If you have a moment, will you let me know what matters most to you?

**[https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/2020_priority_survey](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae15/134673f2/a79f330/6997c55d/1075069234/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiJ9/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/2020_priority_survey?refcode=EM_SURV_B1_111019_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=")**

Thanks,

Michael

Friend —
**Real talk: If you didn’t catch Tulsi on The View this week, you need to watch this video. Then, WE ALL need to share it with our friends, family, colleagues: With every single person you know who worries the Democrats don’t have what it takes to beat President Trump in 2020.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11736401/119844744/-1578841842?refcode=em191110_videot&refcode2=6c970dfb-1904-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Yzk3MGRmYi0xOTA0LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JmGzUAozCvzQl3_Kb9yhWtyOiOlEjmVow3udH-w-CcU=)
**[_Watch Tulsi own the establishment media by shutting down ABC’s Joy Behar and her toxic establishment smears with a message that shows why she’s the President for ALL the People._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11736402/119844745/-1578841842?refcode=em191110_video_captiont&refcode2=6c970dfb-1904-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Yzk3MGRmYi0xOTA0LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JmGzUAozCvzQl3_Kb9yhWtyOiOlEjmVow3udH-w-CcU=)**
The fact that Hillary Clinton mouthpieces in the establishment media are — again — smearing Tulsi as a “useful idiot” and a traitor to her country is unfortunately not news. But Tulsi’s powerful response to these attacks is, and **I hope you will give us a minute to explain why this interview is SO important** — and emblematic of the leadership Tulsi will bring to bear in serving We, the People.
You’re part of this movement because you know Tulsi is running a different campaign than every other candidate, **the only campaign capable of uniting the people and beating Trump in 2020.** You know Tulsi is the ONLY candidate:
* Who can reach across, and heal, the ugly partisan divide that is tearing our country apart
* Who puts service above self and people before politics, no matter the political repercussions
* Who isn’t afraid to directly take-on establishment mouthpieces and interests — in the media, from the left, and the right, in order to fight for the people of this country
* Who knows the true cost of war (and who is behind it) and is ready to serve as our Commander in Chief on Day One, finally bringing an end to decades of regime change war, the new Cold War and nuclear arms race.

Tulsi is bringing OUR fight to the debate stage, to every media interview on every network no matter their political bent, to town halls, cafes, living rooms and backyards all across our country. And it’s because of you that she can keep fighting for us.
Thank you for all that you do in making sure Tulsi can keep speaking truth to power,
TULSI2020

name: Corky Messner
subject: Can you make it out Monday morning?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1833dbf27ad79069/7fb174f40f0bbc9fc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, **Monday is Veterans Day 2019. It’s a special day when we honor the courage, heroism, and sacrifices of those who’ve answered the call to serve in our U.S. Armed Forces.**

As a U.S. Army Ranger veteran, and the father of two West Point cadets, Veterans Day has a special place in my heart. To show my appreciation for our veterans, I want to do something special! [**Can you make it out Monday morning to my Veterans Appreciation Pancake Breakfast?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1833dbf27ad79069/63ffd4bc43c11303c3d6b838967d376c/33153 "RSVP Here")

We’re getting started at 8:00 AM, at the American Legion Jutras Post 43 in Manchester. The breakfast will run until 10:00 AM, and ALL are invited to attend.

This is a free event. Non-veteran attendees are encouraged to bring an item of winter clothing, which we’ll donate to a local charity serving area vets.

The American Legion Jutras Post 43 is located at 56 Boutwell Street.

Peter, I know you agree that we owe an immeasurable debt of gratitude to our nation’s military veterans. And as I’ve written you before, I believe our federal government has failed to deliver on its promises for far too long.

Reforming the VA, and expanding training and placement programs for our veterans, will be among my top priorities as New Hampshire’s next U.S. Senator.

I’m proud to have defended liberty by guarding the Iron Curtain. I’m proud of every patriotic man and woman who has responded to the call to serve our nation.

Join me Monday morning for breakfast as we gather together to show our appreciation for our veterans!

\- Corky
**[See details on Veterans Appreciation Pancake Breakfast>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1833dbf27ad79069/e1a553fc4269a2acc3d6b838967d376c/33153 "RSVP Here")** | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1833dbf27ad79069/e965b67355ebf7eac3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1833dbf27ad79069/4c68459aa2de6cecc3d6b838967d376c/33153)

body:
**The Paris Climate Agreement was a landmark step forward in bringing the nations of our world together to confront the looming challenges of climate change. **

But now the Trump Administration wants to turn its back on the world and drop out of the Paris Agreement.

If the Administration succeeds in withdrawing, the United States will be the _**ONLY**_ nation in the entire world not part of this critical international pact.

[**Add your name to tell the Trump Administration to keep the United States in the Paris Climate Agreement -- _SIGN ON »_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/c3CxbiyLLVkp_6aWU8hbPHDal-zwbKDUcqh78j0v9EI=/eoMmJSBd6ikCWKlonUT8ysvx4I4G0uzG7W7CBW_i2RY=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/c3CxbiyLLVkp_6aWU8hbPHDal-zwbKDUcqh78j0v9EI=/eoMmJSBd6ikCWKlonUT8ysvx4I4G0uzG7W7CBW_i2RY=)

Look, climate change is a threat to all the peoples of the world, and no one single nation can go it alone in the fight against this existential threat.

**The Paris Agreement matters because it commits all of the nations of the world to working together in this fight.**

We must keep the United States committed to this global coalition against climate change.

That's why when I was Mayor of Phoenix, I firmly committed our city to the Paris Climate Agreement.

[**Will you join me in calling on the Trump Administration to abandon their plans to withdraw from the Paris Climate Agreement?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/c3CxbiyLLVkp_6aWU8hbPHDal-zwbKDUcqh78j0v9EI=/eoMmJSBd6ikCWKlonUT8ysvx4I4G0uzG7W7CBW_i2RY=)

Thank you for taking action,

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: The GOP is ready to suppress every vote to win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hey Peter, College student voter participation doubled to 40% in the historic 2018 midterms, helping to facilitate the massive blue wave that retook the House \-- and Republicans took notice. In Texas, the state legislature passed a law that shuttered early polling stations at campuses across the state, early polling stations where tens of thousands of ballots have been cast in past elections. In Florida, Republicans are trying to overturn a voter-approved ballot measure giving ex-felons the right to vote. The GOP knows that it doesn't have any good ideas to convince people to vote for Republican candidates, so instead they have to keep people from voting in the first place \-- these efforts are voter suppression, pure and simple. If we're going to have a fair chance at taking back the Senate and the White House, everyone who is eligible to vote needs the chance to \-- and the GOP must be stopped from cheating. When Democrats Turn Out is committed to ensuring that everyone can vote, but we need to hear from you on this critical issue: **Should Democrats fight GOP voter suppression?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc00/6e9863e8/165837dc/1db09834/787325583/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/ssovX9Zh") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc00/6e9863e8/165837dc/1db09834/787325583/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/ssovX9Zh") Thanks for your support. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc00/6e9863e8/165837dc/1db09839/787325583/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191110c.ND-b&refcode2=BCsEw4zJpdyzzTdNmriX")

Hello

What a great week, on election night I celebrated my 48th birthday in Calhoun County. During that day I spoke with many old friends and made several new ones. Meeting new people on the campaign trail is one of the more rewarding parts of the process. Another great aspect of campaigning is we get to eat at some great Iowa restaurants.
The Blue Heron Bar and Grill (https://www.facebook.com/The-Blue-Heron-Bar-Grill-109388123064977/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c9660c4074-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_05_05_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c9660c4074-25822489) in Mason City has the friendliest people and maybe one of the best black and bleu burgers in the state of Iowa.

Since tomorrow is Veterans Day, I wanted to talk about service and debts owed to those who serve. When I was 17, I made a life defining decision to apply for an Army ROTC scholarship. With that scholarship, I decided to attend the University of Iowa and was later commissioned as a combat engineer officer in the Army. There is no better place than the military to learn or reinforce our Iowa values of hard work, integrity, and leadership.

I am proud of my service to our amazing country and know that my service has made me a better person. I said in my speech to the Kossuth County GOP (https://www.facebook.com/Kossuth-County-Republicans-635696166482379/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c9660c4074-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_05_05_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c9660c4074-25822489) Veterans Day tribute, I am frustrated watching career politicians continue to promise to help veterans while never actually getting anything done.

When elected to Congress, I intend to honor the sacrifices made by veterans by supporting legislation to promote their health, wellness, and quality of life by
* Backing reforms that make it easier for veterans to choose the treatment options they believe are most appropriate for them, including those outside of VA Hospitals.
* Expanding the options for mental health services that are available to veterans.
* Reducing the stigma of mental health issues for all veterans.
* Supporting proposed advancements in telehealth services, as these types of services aid in the care that disabled and rural veterans are able to receive.
* Having a real discussion about how to best deliver quality healthcare to veterans.
* Continue to look for innovative ways to take care of those who raised their right hand and swore they would always protect the country.

I can't fight for the men and women who have fought for our country without your support. Please consider chipping in $5 (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c9660c4074-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_05_05_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c9660c4074-25822489) , $15 (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c9660c4074-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_05_05_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c9660c4074-25822489) or even $25 (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c9660c4074-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_05_05_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c9660c4074-25822489) to our campaign, as well as help spread my message throughout your community. Your generous donation can be made here. (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c9660c4074-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_05_05_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c9660c4074-25822489)

Feel free to reach out to me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712)-579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you.

I invite you to read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we will accomplish together that are yet to come!

Your neighbor,
More On Veterans
Building Our Network
This week was a busy and informative one on the campaign trail! My team and I attended FIVE county central committee meetings in Carroll (https://www.facebook.com/Carroll-County-Iowa-Republicans-140536195979207/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c9660c4074-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_05_05_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c9660c4074-25822489) , Cerro Gordo, (https://www.facebook.com/CerroGordoGOP?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c9660c4074-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_05_05_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c9660c4074-25822489) Audubon, (https://www.facebook.com/AudubonGOP?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c9660c4074-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_05_05_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c9660c4074-25822489) Calhoun (https://www.facebook.com/Calhoun-County-IA-GOP-706906856087900?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c9660c4074-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_05_05_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c9660c4074-25822489) and Winnebago (https://www.facebook.com/WinnebagoCountyIowaGOP?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c9660c4074-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_05_05_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c9660c4074-25822489) ! We caught up with fellow conservatives and discussed veterans issues as well as the shameful actions of the Democrats surrounding impeachment. Additionally, I was privileged to attend Iowa GOP's Annual Lincoln Reagan Dinner where I had the opportunity to hear distinguished Senator Lindsey Graham speak.

Thanks to Journey Senior Services (https://www.facebook.com/journeyseniorservices/?__tn__=K-R&eid=ARDqd-hjjkiTpFyI6CVWNi5RnWoAax4S_fUPfVon8N79eXuxrErGnvhXHF5hHblcog_SaBqQ_g6GarvV&fref=mentions&__xts__%5B0%5D=68.ARBLBVIiauf7cpRqF-Frqk_SHqJ4pU01Ai-5luoOl9Js02vQgRKvQjg3ziVH96nNG55M0aU2sg1cYb_eJHzP-jPs0z1J2yOFR6J8NI2BfwNSvylkGuOoOMYox1tnZiX5Jsd8AUNlM4XlOlw1ql2oD1qvgCC_GbDpAzedJ7EadVz0lNWWZl8Vf0P_nNDxwz5B_imuioHehn8UtOYmmPizi6y7hXHzkIDCbQtCm5dbNnWqBCwpQZfSBpnCRZU-pNz7TgfPbm8pxzDWcCjLEQtLzz5-PbTRLQQv0kOxwH_BRnlWllYA-73lSn8vMYJc-kB9d99b-nDy9rlxPZnW7t-Uys9Hlq2h&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c9660c4074-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_05_05_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c9660c4074-25822489) , Nancy Snyder, and Stacie Tonniges for allowing us to tour their innovative dementia care center in Carroll! This privately-run facility is unique in rural Iowa and serves as a great example of Iowans finding solutions to take care of their neighbors without help from the government.

Lastly, I had the opportunity to attend the USO Ribbon Cutting at Camp Dodge. Since I trained there in the early 90s Camp Dodge has changed and grown dramatically. It is now one of the top three busiest National Guard training facilities in the country. The USO building that was just opened is a great place for visiting soldiers to rest and recharge.

https://richardsforcongress.com/republican-4th-congressional-district-candidate-bret-richards-says-it-is-time-for-career-politicians-to-go-and-for-congress-to-regain-control/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c9660c4074-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_05_05_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c9660c4074-25822489

**Message from Gov. Kasich**

_Monday is Veterans Day and it's an important time for each of us to pause and think about the brave men and women who've put their lives on the line to fight for our freedoms. If you know a veteran, please take a moment to reach out to thank them for the sacrifices they've made for America._
_
This weekend also marks the 30-year anniversary since the Berlin Wall came tumbling down in 1989, liberating millions from Soviet rule. __Freedom doesn't come for free. The world looks to America, as President Reagan said, as that shining city on a hill serving as a beacon for freedom. We have our veterans and lost heroes to thank for ours._
_
-John_
|

**New Hampshire**

clean_body: Monday is Veterans Day and it's an important time for each of us to pause and think about the brave men and women | | Message from Gov. Kasich Monday is Veterans Day and it's an important time for each of us to pause and think about the brave men and women who've put their lives on the line to fight for our freedoms. If you know a veteran, please take a moment to reach out to thank them for the sacrifices they've made for America. This weekend also marks the 30-year anniversary since the Berlin Wall came tumbling down in 1989, liberating millions from Soviet rule. Freedom doesn't come for free. The world looks to America, as President Reagan said, as that shining city on a hill serving as a beacon for freedom. We have our veterans and lost heroes to thank for ours. -John | New Hampshire Peter - Gov. Kasich was recently in Durham, N.H. to discuss his new book and the prospects of running for President in 2020. With the deadline looming to file the paperwork necessary to run in the GOP Primary Election, Gov. Kasich indicated that he does not currently see a path to defeating Trump in that election. His plan is to continue to watch the wild turns of this election cycle and keep his options open for the future. . | Boston Globe Guest Column Please take a moment to read Gov.
